_doc: v0.25.0 — example manifest written by `tools/parallel_wave.py emit`. The PreToolUse hook `parallel_conflict_guard.py` reads this and blocks any Edit/Write whose target file is owned by a different agent_id than the one making the call. Schema is documented in spec specs/v0.25.0-parallel-subagent-guard.md §5 D4-D5. Do NOT hand-edit `.agent-toolkit/.parallel_wave.json` — use the CLI: `python tools/parallel_wave.py emit --wave NAME --zone agent-X:path1,path2 ...`. Owned patterns support glob (`*`), dir-prefix (trailing `/`), or exact path.

_schema.ttl_seconds: int — manifest auto-expires after this many seconds (default 3600)

zones.agent_id: string — matches envelope.agent_id of the sub-agent
